task_tokens_consumed: Does any 2024-2026 paper apply PAC-Bayes bounds with data-dependent prior to derive non-vacuous test-accuracy bounds for in-context learning?

hypothesized_clusters.cluster_description: Classical PAC-Bayes bounds on neural-net weights with data-dependent priors.
Theoretical analysis of ICL as Bayesian inference or gradient descent.
Bounds specific to few-shot learning regimes.
LLM treated as approximate Bayesian inference engine.
Recent efforts to achieve non-vacuous bounds via compression, sparsity, prior choice.

landscape_completeness_claim: Five clusters span weight-space PAC-Bayes, ICL theory, few-shot bounds, Bayesian LLM view, and non-vacuous efforts. Candidate intersects multiple clusters.
